backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining case management system with types (Case, Activity, Document), persistent state maps, authorization/storage mixins, and public functions for CRUD operations on cases, activities, and documents with permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of disabling the 'Add Comment' button when the comment textarea is empty in ActivitySection.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including routing, authentication, case management UI, activity tracking, document handling, and styling configurations.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and CSS custom properties defining OKLCH color system for light and dark themes with teal-focused brand colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Kollect Lite application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing routing with TanStack Router, authentication state via Internet Identity, and conditional rendering of login prompt or main application.
Activity form component with action/outcome dropdowns, comments textarea, and Add Comment button that is disabled when comments are empty or whitespace-only, submitting activities to backend via mutation.
frontend/src/components/ActivityTimeline: Timeline component fetching and displaying case activities from backend in reverse chronological order with timestamps, badges, payment details, and comments.
frontend/src/components/CaseCard.tsx: Compact case card component displaying debtor info, status badge, customer ID with copy button, phone number, and color-coded DPD badge with click navigation to case detail.
frontend/src/components/CommentHistorySe: Displays a timeline of comments for a case with colored backgrounds, timestamps, and a scrollable container that shows up to 3 comments with connecting dots and lines.
frontend/src/components/CopyButton.tsx: A small button component that copies text to clipboard and shows a check icon for 2 seconds after successful copy.
frontend/src/components/DocumentsSection: Displays a list of documents with file type icons, upload dates, and preview buttons, plus Upload and Scan action buttons at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header with Kollect Lite branding, logo, and a logout button that clears authentication and query cache.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper that includes the header, outlet for routed content, and a footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Full-screen login page with Kollect Lite branding and a button to trigger Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx: A visual iPhone frame wrapper component with notch, status bar, and scrollable content area for mobile UI previews.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Displays a colored badge for case status (ESCALATED, ACTIVE, PTP) with appropriate styling for each status type.
frontend/src/data/dummyComments.ts: Defines Comment interface and exports an array of dummy comment data for multiple cases with timestamps, agent names, and comment text.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, initializes access control, and invalidates dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating case data, activities, and documents using the backend actor with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, including Kollect Lite brand colors (teal-dark, gray-bg) and design tokens for UI components.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/CaseDetail.tsx: Case detail page component displaying debtor information, status, contact actions, and sections for activities and documents with dummy case data lookup.
frontend/src/pages/TaskQueue.tsx: Task queue page displaying a searchable, filterable list of 20 dummy collection cases with status badges and a phone mockup component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings including container, border radius, shadows, and accordion animations, with typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file showing a feature to disable the 'Add Comment' button when the textarea is empty, with one existing feature (REQ-1) and one pending feature request (AR-1) for making the button interactive only when the comment field is filled.
